     JoinAnalysis analyze_department_employees_impl(const std::vector<Department>& depts, const std::vector<Employee>& emps) {
         using namespace sqlgen::literals;

         auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect();
         sqlgen::write(depts)(conn);
         sqlgen::write(emps)(conn);

         // Build the queries
         auto inner_join_query = sqlgen::read<std::vector<JoinResult>> 
                                 | sqlgen::inner_join<Employee, "t2">("department_id"_t1 == "department_id"_t2);
         auto left_join_query = sqlgen::read<std::vector<JoinResult>> 
                                | sqlgen::left_join<Department, "d">("department_id"_e == "department_id"_d);
         auto right_join_query = sqlgen::read<std::vector<JoinResult>> 
                                | sqlgen::right_join<Employee, "e">("department_id"_d == "department_id"_e);
         auto full_join_query = sqlgen::read<std::vector<JoinResult>> 
                                | sqlgen::full_join<Employee, "e">("department_id"_d == "department_id"_e);

         // Execute the queries
         auto inner_results = inner_join_query(conn).value();
         auto left_results = left_join_query(conn).value();
         auto right_results = right_join_query(conn).value();
         auto full_results = full_join_query(conn).value();

         // Assign to the JoinAnalysis struct
         JoinAnalysis analysis;
         analysis.inner_join_results = std::move(inner_results);
         analysis.left_join_results = std::move(left_results);
         analysis.right_join_results = std::move(right_results);
         analysis.full_join_results = std::move(full_results);

         return analysis;
     }
